===== aixa-responder.service unit ====
# /etc/systemd/system/aixa-responder.service
[Unit]
Description=Aixa Medina Claude autonomous responder
After=aixa-bot.service network-online.target
Wants=aixa-bot.service

[Service]
Type=simple
User=azureuser
WorkingDirectory=/home/azureuser
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /home/azureuser/aixa-responder.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

===== aixa-bot.service unit ====
# /etc/systemd/system/aixa-bot.service
[Unit]
Description=Aixa Medina Claude Bot Endpoint
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=azureuser
WorkingDirectory=/home/azureuser
Environment=PORT=3992
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /home/azureuser/aixa-bot.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
